Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daryl Weinroth for Gila Millar.

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position. The Court granted the Petition for Order Determining Title To Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
